raw_consumer_statement: Fraud was alerted on this credit card. Multiple charges were made from starting end of XX/XX/XXXX to month of XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX charges were made that are being determined valid. The credit card company is stating that it is valid because they determined that the card was identified as being in your possession and chip card technology was used, which can not be counterfeited. The dates and amounts are as follows : XX/XX/XXXX XXXX. {$97.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX. {$96.00} XX/XX/XXXX XXXX {$96.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX {$95.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX. {$95.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX {$99.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX. {$95.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX. {$94.00} XX/XX/XXXX. XXXX {$95.00} All these charges were made in states other than NJ where I reside in. I can provide bank statement showing a purchases made in NJ on XX/XX/XXXX. On that date the charges were allegedly done in TN. I have a reservation email of charges on XX/XX/XXXX where I was in XXXX XXXX using the XXXX blue card at check out. Along with XXXX XXXX charges showing I was in NJ but the charges on that date allegedly state I was in MA. I also have an XXXX XXXX  showing on XX/XX/XXXX that I was on the NJ XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX the alleged charges were stated that they were made in Oregon. As we explained to the credit card that these charges are fraud.
